# TechAndMe Playbook

# Playbook Document Standard Template

---

## Document Information

| Property | Value |
|----------|-------|
| Document ID | TMP-XXX |
| Title | Replace with Document Title |
| Version | 0.1 |
| Status | Draft |
| Classification | Public |
| Owner | TechAndMe |
| Author | Replace with Author |
| Reviewer | Replace with Reviewer |
| Approver | Replace with Approver |
| Effective Date | YYYY-MM-DD |
| Last Updated | YYYY-MM-DD |

---

> **Building Better Software.**
>
> **Building Better Engineers.**

---

# Table of Contents

> *Update this table of contents before publication.*

1. Preamble
2. Purpose
3. Scope
4. Main Content
5. Related Documents
6. Revision History
7. Closing Reflection

---

# Preamble

Provide a brief introduction explaining the context and importance of the document.

The preamble should help readers understand why the document exists before presenting detailed information.

---

# 1. Purpose

State the purpose of the document.

Answer the question:

> **Why does this document exist?**

---

# 2. Scope

Define the boundaries of the document.

Describe:

- what is covered;
- what is excluded;
- who should use the document.

---

# 3. Main Content

Organize the main body using numbered headings.

Example:

## 3.1

Section

## 3.2

Section

## 3.3

Section

Continue as required.

---

# Related Documents

List documents that support or complement this document.

Example:

- TMP-001 Engineering Charter
- TMP-002 Vision Strategy and Impact
- TMP-003 Engineering Principles

---

# Revision History

| Version | Date | Description | Author |
|----------|------|-------------|--------|
| 0.1 | YYYY-MM-DD | Initial draft | |

---

# Closing Reflection

Provide a short concluding statement that reinforces the purpose of the document and encourages thoughtful engineering practice.

---

## Document Maintenance

This document shall be reviewed whenever:

- engineering standards change;
- document structure changes;
- governance requirements change;
- improvements are identified.

---

---

**TechAndMe Playbook**

**Building Better Software.**

**Building Better Engineers.**
